decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-sbs already exists as a registry record. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id (route_m15-sbs) — same route (M15+), SBS variant, Manhattan, First/Second Avenues. Per canonicalize rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 Select Bus Service (SBS) along this route
SBS service operates uniformly between East 126th Street in Harlem and South Ferry

proposed_relations.description: M15 SBS replaced M15 Limited service on October 10, 2010 on First and Second Avenues

evidence_refs.source_quote: On the M15 Limited that SBS replaced

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-local-2010-09-14 already exists as a registry record. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id — same route (M15), Local variant, Manhattan, First/Second Avenues.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 local ridership has been dropping as some riders transition to the SBS. M15 Local and Limited services had roughly equal ridership totals

proposed_relations.description: M15 Local continues to operate alongside M15 SBS on First and Second Avenues

evidence_refs.source_quote: M15 local ridership has been dropping as some riders transition to the SBS

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-limited-2010-06-09 already exists as a registry record. The observation resolves to its own base_record_id — same route (M15), Limited variant, Manhattan, First/Second Avenues.

evidence_refs.source_quote: On the M15 Limited that SBS replaced
M15 Local and Limited services had roughly equal ridership totals, but now 62% of all M15 riders choose the SBS.
